translated: If a child does something that pleases the parents, they should not be scolded, but should be encouraged to do more.

text: Petro akakaћА banun…Ф pete ebu n…Ы buvuћГ…Ф m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы edzu ekluisi esi p…Ы ekulu kititiћБ ay…Ы. K…Ыl…Ы g…Ы etsyina y…Ыam…Ы akp…Ы adz…Ы …Фk…Ф…Ф, etse…Цe y…Ыas…Ы, вАЬTabita, l…Ф…ЫtitiћБ!вАЭ Adal…Ы y…ЫawuhuћГ…Ф k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы am…Ф Petro…Ф, al…Ф azaћГ kititiћА.
translated: When Peter arrived, they took him to the upstairs room. All the widows stood around him crying and showing him the robes and other clothing that Dorcas had made while she was still with them. Peter sent them all out of the room; then he got down on his knees and prayed. Turning toward the dead woman, he said, вАЬTabitha, get up.вАЭ She opened her eyes, and seeing Peter she sat up.

ref: Now the chief priests have given him the power to come here and arrest anyone who worships in your name.вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы aba …Ыk…Ыl…Ы n…ЫћА ohumi eden…Ф ban…ФluћГazazaћГ agbagbla …Фk…Ф as…Ы t…Ы ebevuћГ an…Ф ka nyia ka g…Ыekulu w…Ф…Ыnye…Ы.вАЭ
translated: The chief of the town said that if they do not give him the respect he deserves, he will not attend the festival.

ref: But to keep this thing from spreading, we will warn them never again to speak to anyone about the name of Jesus.вАЭ
text: P…Ф t…Ы kibui …Ыl…Ы taay…ЫћА…Ы …Фv…Ы n…Ы banun…Ф m…Ы…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы s…Ы b…Фkp…Ы …Фsha k…Ф ban…Ф al…Ы t…ЫћА bat…Ы ada…Ц…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы etse…Цe ananaћА n…Ы kinye …Ыl…Ы m…Ы.
translated: If you do not take care of your health, you will spend all your money in the hospital trying to get it back.

ref: They arrived at Salamis and began to preach God's message in the synagogues. They also had John as a helper.
text: G…Ы bediku Salami…Ы, ba…Ц…Ф Owusoso Akaa nibui…Ы n…Ы Yudan…Ы …Ыtsy…Фak…Ф. Yohanes Marko azaћГ bal…Ы …Фbha p…Ы azapl…Ыn…Ф al…Ы.
translated: When Salami died, they took him to Owusoso Akaa near Yudane where they buried him. John Mark was the one who dug the grave for him.
